problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to they, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
